zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Katherine Cumberworth於大約1390年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親John Cumberworth21歲，母親Elizabeth Hundon6歲。她和Sir JOHN De BUSSY至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1461年1月21日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾豪加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Cumberworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Cumberworth in Lincolnshire, named from an Old English personal name Cumbre + worth ‘enclosure’. There is also a Lower and an Upper Cumberworth in Yorkshire but these appear not to have contributed significantly to the modern surname, which is concentrated in Lincolnshire.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Katherine Cumberworth was born about 1390, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Cumberworth, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth Hundon, was 6. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Sir JOHN De BUSSY. She died on 21 January 1461, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Hougham, Lincolnshire, England.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Sir JOHN De BUSSY. ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Katherine Cumberworth(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Cumberworth(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hundon(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 Sir JOHN De BUSSY(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 허그함에 묻혔다.
